title: oSzoukaua's: Super Sprint
description: Allows you to super sprint by double tapping your sprint key! Move even faster!
body:
# Description: This pack adds a new movement mechanic called "**Super sprinting**" by double tapping and holding your sprint key, you will start super sprinting, this movement mode makes you run faster than sprint jumping, allows you to step up 1 whole block, but doesnt allow jumping, or block/entity interaction while super sprinting
### The sprint key is not double tapping "W" minecraft has a dedicated sprint key "Left Control" by default

This pack has a **welcome message** which is **disabled by default**, but can be enabled by typing: ``` /scoreboard players set welcome_message oszu_sps 1 ```




## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
